title: Google
desc: The project is a copy of the Google homepage, made using Vite and Sass. Adaptive layout, smooth animation and an ordered file structure are implemented. The project aims to develop a clean layout, optimize and work with the collector.

title: The Loop
desc: A React project using Redux for state management. The app makes API requests and displays products divided into male and female categories. I also integrated Three.JS for displaying a 3D model of a running shoe, which makes the interface more interactive and modern. The project has become a good practice for working with the API, global state, and 3D graphics on the web.

title: Bank-Hotel
desc: Bank-Hotel is a project made in React using regular CSS. Implemented adaptive layout, smooth animations and a neat component structure. The project helps you develop interface design skills, work with animations, and create a user-friendly experience.
